uses: Uber Tristram portal key (with Key of Hate and Key of Destruction)

demand spikes when players farm torches in bulk
supply_notes: supply is steady from key farming runs

often traded in sets, not individually

rmt_sites.notes: External cash-market signal only. Do not present as a recommendation to buy or sell.
